summary: Senior full-stack engineer with 7 years building high-throughput fintech systems. Led migration of payments platform from monolith to microservices at Stripe, cutting latency by 40%. Deep expertise in Python/FastAPI, React/TypeScript, and AWS. AWS Solutions Architect certified.

positions.title: Senior Software Engineer
positions.description: Led the migration of the payments processing service from a monolith to microservices using Python/FastAPI and Kubernetes. Reduced p99 API latency by 40% through Redis caching and query optimization. Built real-time webhook delivery system handling 100k events/day using Kafka. Mentored 3 junior engineers and led weekly architecture reviews.

positions.title: Full-Stack Engineer
positions.description: Built financial data aggregation APIs serving 3M daily active users. Developed React/TypeScript dashboard for financial analytics. Implemented OAuth2 flows and bank-grade encryption. Set up GitHub Actions CI/CD pipelines reducing deploy time from 45 min to 8 min.

positions.title: Software Engineer
positions.description: Developed Python backend services for SMS delivery pipeline. Built internal tooling with React. Maintained PostgreSQL database schemas and wrote complex SQL queries.

education.degree_name: Bachelor of Science in Computer Science

projects.title: PayFlow — Open Source Payment Orchestrator
projects.description: Built an open-source payment orchestration layer in Python/FastAPI supporting Stripe, Braintree, and PayPal. 1.2k GitHub stars. Used by 15 startups in production.

projects.title: RealTime Ledger
projects.description: Event-sourced ledger service built with Python, Kafka, and PostgreSQL for double-entry bookkeeping at scale.
